query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A grayscale image depicting a person with light-colored hair positioned at the center of a curving circular formation, their face and upper body visible within a dark central area. The figure rests their chin on raised, bent arms, surrounded by flowing gray shapes that extend toward the edges of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal grayscale portrait rendered with heavy intentional blur and smeared, absent fine details, showing a person with light hair at the center of a swirling vortex. The image features an oppressively low-contrast treatment with crushed midtones and weak separation between light and dark, producing a suffocating, dreamlike atmosphere where facial features and textures dissolve into ambiguity.
